name: claude-extra-usage
description: Displays Claude extra credit usage as a percentage in the VS Code status bar.
author: Lars Wilhelmer

claudeExtraUsage.organizationId.description: Your Claude organization ID (visible in the URL at claude.ai/settings).

claudeExtraUsage.sessionKey.markdownDescription: Your `claude.ai` session key cookie value. Open DevTools on claude.ai → Application → Cookies → `sessionKey`.

claudeExtraUsage.refreshIntervalMinutes.description: How often (in minutes) to re-fetch usage from the API.
